function.message: Handled the next inbox item end-to-end. I applied OCR-style structured extraction (YAML frontmatter) to all 8 requested finance records, preserving each original markdown body verbatim below frontmatter, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS on entry to 99_system, workflows, 00_inbox, and 50_finance lanes, used finance schema for required fields, preserved original bodies during frontmatter migration, avoided partial completion, and deleted processed inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly listed 8 finance documents to run through OCR workflow. Each target file contained visible values for all required schema fields defined in 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, enabling complete extraction without guessing. I wrote schema-compliant frontmatter into each listed file and preserved the existing body text beneath it, then deleted the inbox file per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update guidance.
completed_steps_laconic: write updated frontmatter+body to all 8 records
